summary: Iter 59 backend + frontend verification — all green. Backend: 7/7 pytest passed (test_iter59_routers.py covering extracted Sources router GET/lock/unlock, extracted Location router /analyze /provider, new Dashboard router /news live+cached and /competition). Frontend: Dashboard fully rewritten (old Asset Command Center confirmed REMOVED; new page renders 'PROPOS · HOSPITALITY INTELLIGENCE' kicker + 'Athens market · today.' headline + [data-testid=dashboard-summary] Today's Read card + [data-testid=dashboard-competition] with comp-group-acquisition and comp-group-operate bar groups including 'Open Invest' / 'Open Operate' green CTAs + [data-testid=dashboard-news] section showing 3 cards with real GREEK REPORTER / GTP HEADLINES sources, relative times, and 'Read full story' external links). Operate result page: [data-testid=operate-result-keycards] now renders the LOCATION 5th card with 7.5 score and STRONG verdict pill; clicking opens [data-testid=loc-details-modal] which closes via [data-testid=loc-modal-close]; standalone [data-testid=operate-result-location] confirmed REMOVED. [data-testid=operate-result-simulator] present between Top 3 Fixes and Build Action Plan with simulator-adr, simulator-occ, simulator-output, simulator-annual-delta (initial €+14,148), simulator-reset-btn. Live update verified: ArrowRight x15 on simulator-adr-input changed annual delta €+14,148 → €+18,198, reset button correctly returns to €+14,148. Invest dashboard: [data-testid=invest-location-pill] renders SLIM 'Location 7.5/10 Strong' pill BETWEEN Why-strip and detail-toggles; clicking opens the same loc-details-modal; standalone [data-testid=invest-section-location] confirmed REMOVED. Regression: invest-detail-toggles, Find Better Deals CTA, /portfolio/demo all render without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still ~4000 lines as expected per iter59 plan (only sources/location/dashboard extracted). Future iterations should keep splitting (assets, operate, invest endpoints) to drive that below 700 lines.

Dashboard competition uses deterministic sha256 seed (portfolio_acq=78..83, portfolio_op=74..79). has_real_comparables=false flag is properly exposed so the frontend can degrade gracefully — good. Wire AirDNA / PriceLabs once available.

dashboard_news.py 30-min cache implemented via news_cache Mongo collection — verified warm second-call returns fast in pytest. Fallback to baseline if all feeds fail is in code; not exercised in this run (live feeds returned items).
/api/location/analyze response schema uses scores.location + sub-scores (walkability/tourism/beach_marina/convenience) — no top-level overall_score field. Test assertions updated to match.
Two 401 console errors during Invest navigation (resource preload) — appear to be non-core analytics/preview-layer assets, not PropOS APIs. Functional flow unaffected.
LocationScoreCard.jsx is reused as compact-card (Operate) + slim-pill (Invest) + modal — single source of truth for the Location score sheet, good DRY pattern.
test_credentials: None — all routes tested are public demo routes.
seed_data_creation: test_sources_lock_unlock_roundtrip creates a unique test_field_<uuid> lock on asset_id=demo and cleans up via unlock in the same test (no residual data). News cache warmed on first /api/dashboard/news call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 59 fully green. Backend routers live at /app/backend/routers/{sources,location,dashboard}.py — each calls set_db(db) at import time inside server.py. New endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/news?limit=N returns {items,count,generated_at} from live RSS (ekathimerini/gtp/greekreporter) with 30-min news_cache; GET /api/dashboard/competition returns acquisition+operate blocks with portfolio/market/top_quartile/deltas + summary + has_real_comparables=false. Frontend testids — Dashboard: dashboard-summary, dashboard-competition, comp-group-acquisition, comp-group-operate, dashboard-news, dashboard-news-card-N. Operate result: operate-result-keycards (now 5 cards), operate-keycard-location-score (new 5th card, opens loc-details-modal), operate-result-simulator with simulator-adr, simulator-occ, simulator-output, simulator-annual-delta, simulator-adr-input, simulator-occ-input, simulator-reset-btn. Invest: invest-location-pill replaces removed invest-section-location. Shared modal: loc-details-modal + loc-modal-close. Cinematic timings: Operate ~10s wait after demo-btn before opener-continue-btn; Invest ~9-10s wait before opener-continue-btn. Sliders react to keyboard ArrowLeft/Right (verified live).
